chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-660 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 04-12-2025 None present for the applicant. **** Applicant is called absent despite issuance of direct notice for today’s date of hearing; no intimation is received. Even on the last two consecutive dates of hearing, applicant remained absent, which reflects that the applicant has lost interest in pursuing this matter. Resultantly, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
